name: respondent
description: Source-level entity or balancing authority identifier.

name: respondent_name
description: Human-readable name from the source response.

name: type
description: Source response category such as demand or generation.

name: type_name
description: Human-readable type label from the source.

name: value
description: Reported metric value from the source.

name: value_units
description: Unit of measurement as reported by the source.

name: period
description: Observation period string as returned by the source.

name: fueltype
description: Fuel type code for generation-related rows.

name: batch_date
description: Extraction batch date used as the partition key.

name: _batch_id
description: Pipeline-generated identifier for the extraction batch.

name: _source_url
description: Source endpoint URL used for the batch extract.
